_comment: Provenance ledger for every raw asset input. CC0-only is a hard rule (validate.mjs enforces the license literal): attribution UI conflicts with the no-external-links-for-kids invariant. Raw downloads live in .cache/ (git-ignored); sha256 lets a clean clone verify a re-download. Add an entry BEFORE using any model from a pack.

sources.name: Kenney Nature Kit
sources.notes: ~330 low-poly nature models (trees, rocks, foliage, terrain). Download manually; record sha256 of the zip when first used.

sources.name: Kenney Fantasy Town Kit
sources.notes: Walls, fences, planters, lamps for the urban zone.

sources.name: Kenney Holiday Kit
sources.notes: Snow-covered props for the winter seasonal pass.

sources.name: Quaternius Ultimate Animated Animal Pack
sources.notes: Rigged animals with Idle/Walk clips (fox, deer, ...). glTF downloads preferred.

sources.name: Quaternius Animated Fish Pack
sources.notes: Animated fish for the pond zone.

sources.name: Quaternius Ultimate Nature Pack
sources.notes: Trees, flowers, grass, rocks, crystals (elsewhere islet).

sources.name: Poly Pizza singles by Quaternius (Raccoon, Frog, Wasp, Cloud)
sources.notes: ONLY Quaternius uploads are CC0 on Poly Pizza. 'Poly by Google' archive models are CC-BY 3.0 and are EXCLUDED.

sources.name: Authored in Blockbench (butterfly, hummingbird, songbird, soaring bird, snail, worm, wisp, dragonfly)
sources.notes: Hand-built originals; source .bbmodel files committed under sources_authored/ when created.
